summary: Completed comprehensive testing of language persistence functionality across the application. All language switching, persistence, and navigation scenarios work correctly.
passed_tests: Language switcher successfully changes from English to French with localStorage persistence
French language persists when navigating from landing page to /auth/login page
Language switcher successfully changes from English to Spanish with localStorage persistence
Spanish language persists when navigating from landing page to /terms-conditions page
French language persists across full page reload (no flash of English)
French language persists when navigating to /privacy-policy page
Language switcher successfully changes back to English from French
English language persists across navigation to /auth/login, /terms-conditions, and /privacy-policy
localStorage 'lang' key is correctly set and maintained for all language changes
All page content displays in the correct language (French, Spanish, English) after language switches
Language selector dropdown shows correct available options (PT-Português, EN-English, FR-Français, ES-Español)
No flash of default English language occurs on page reloads
